title: Chapter 29
content:
Chapter 29: Chapter 29: Buying Spree

While walking outside, Damon opens up the lust store and looks for an ability. He found something that interests him.

[All-Seeing Celestial Eyes]

[Description: It is an ability that enhances the eyes. It allows the user to look far away and reveal all hidden secrets.]

[Ability]

[Price: 500,000,000,000]

’Hmm... The description is really vague, but the price shouldn’t lie... Alright, System, buy this using the ability coupon.’

[You bought All-Seeing Celestial Eyes. -1 ability coupon]

Then he tried it out, and now he could see the Azure Cloud City a dozen kilometers distant with crystal clarity. And as he wanted to try the reveal function, he heard a ding.

[Ding!]

[Compatible ability found.]

[Fusing Incubus eyes with All-Seeing Celestial Eyes.]

Suddenly, Damon felt unbearable pain in his eyes. He gritted his teeth and used all his willpower not to scream in pain.

Veins popped on his forehead while his whole body trembled.

"UUggghh..."

Suddenly, drops of blood trailed out of his eyes, and it continued for a while.

After a while, the pain finally subsided, and a message popped up.

[Ding!]

[Incubus eyes and All-Seeing Celestial Eyes fused successfully]

Damon breathed heavily before he wiped the blood and opened his eyes. If one looked closely, different golden colored patterns could be seen moving inside his golden irises, making him look more mysterious.

Then another screen popped out.

[Incubus Celestial Eyes: You can see a woman’s pleasure point and secret. It now allows the user to look far away and reveal all hidden secrets. The new status window can be seen now.]

’Wow, that’s unexpected.’

Then he looked around but saw nobody and decided to test it later.

Now he wants a technique. Damon has all elemental affinities, but without a technique, he can’t use them now.

So, he decided to buy one, because he believes that the technique in the store will be better than the technique that will be given by the sect. And he doesn’t have to sit and learn it. He opens up the lust store again.

[Lust store]

[Lust points: 110,850]

<Cultivation resources>

<Cultivation/combat techniques>

<Weapons and armor>

<Recovery pills>

<Spiritual materials>

<Lust items>

<Spiritual Roots>

<Talismans>

<Bloodlines and constitutions>

<Miscellaneous>

After looking for a while, he found something interesting.

[Heavenly Tribulation Lightning Art]

[Description: A special technique that allows the user to control and generate the Heavenly Tribulation Lightning. The legends say that it was created in an accident where nine Heavenly Tribulation Lightning descent to punish a newly born elemental god.]

[Heaven Grade Technique (can be upgraded)]

[Price: 5o,000]

"System, what is Heavenly Tribulation Lightning?"

[Heavenly Tribulation Lightning is special lightning that heaven uses to test someone when they are trying to become a god.]

[For example, when Origin Spirit Realm tries to advance to the Divine realm, the heaven will test them to see if they are worthy or not. If they are worthy of the ascent to a higher realm or world, if not, they die.]

"So, this lighting very special?"

[Yes, it will not just hurt the body; it can even hurt the soul. Any affinities will render useless.]

"

Alright, System, Heavenly Tribulation Lightning Art."

[Caution Host! Due to your low affinities with lightning, the Heavenly Tribulation Lightning Art cannot show its true power until your affinities reach 200. Are you sure you want to buy it?]

"Will there be any backlash?"

[No Host, with current affinities, it will be only regular lightning but stronger.]

"Then there’s no reason not to buy it, I can feel this art calling for me, buy it."

[You bought Heavenly Tribulation Lightning Art. -50,000 lust point]

’Now, I have Sword Master Memories and Heavenly Tribulation Lightning Art, for fighting, The Astral Step for traveling and escape in case I meet someone that I can’t beat, what do I need more...’ Damon thought in his mind.

’Ahh, that’s right! I need something to hide, even with Astral Step; if I can lose the pursuer, they will catch up eventually.’ Damon realizes what is needed and looks for a concealment technique.

After looking for a few minutes, he couldn’t seem to find what he like the he asked the system.

"System, give me a technique for hiding and concealment."

[For hiding and concealment, it’s recommended to use the dark attribute technique, host. The system recommends this for the host.]

[Eternal Darkness’s Broken Shadow Art]

[Description: A special technique that allows the user to conceal his aura to an extreme degree. This also allows the user to completely disappear from the others’ senses.]

[Heaven Grade Technique (can be upgraded)]

[Price: 30,000]

"Hmm... I like it, buy it." after reading the description.

[You bought Eternal Darkness’s Broken Shadow Art. -30,000 lust point]

Damon nodded with a satisfied smile on his face and opened his status.

[Name: Damon Arcknight]

[Age: 18]

[Cultivation: Elementary Spirit Realm - Eight Level] [Can advance with lust point]

[Affinities: Fire: 60, Water: 60, Ice: 60, Wind: 60, Lightning: 60, Earth: 60, Nature: 60, Light: 60, Dark: 60, Sword: 50] [Can be upgraded with the lust point]

[Spiritual Roots: Elemental Spiritual Roots] [Earth Grade - Peak] [Can be upgraded with the lust point, and new roots can be bought in the lust store]

[Bloodline: Blood of Incubus Lord] [Mortal Grade - Peak] [Can be upgraded with lust point]

[Physique: Body of Incubus Lord] [Mortal Grade - Peak] [Can be upgraded with lust point]

[Lust points: 30,850]

[Harem Members: Ariel Aquaria]

[Ability: Incubus Touch, Incubus Aura, Incubus Celestial Eyes]

[Technique: Yin-Yang Harem Scripture, Astral Steps, Heavenly Tribulation Lightning Art, Eternal Darkness’s Broken Shadow Art]

Damon can now see the new technique on technique tab on his status and realizes that he spent 80,000 points in a few minutes. He needs more points, but he can’t just stay and have sex all day.

It will surely attract unwanted attention and bring countless troubles if the sect learns of it. He already attracts attention from the sect with his Sword Intent; he doesn’t want to attract more and blow his cover about the system.

He also doesn’t want to just stay in sect all day long, since he reincarnated in this world, it’s kind of a waste if he just stays in one place and only has sex all day long.

With that in mind, Damon moved toward the Azure Orb Treasury.
